title: FizzBuzz
description: Read an integer N from stdin. Print FizzBuzz for numbers 1 to N: 'Fizz' if divisible by 3, 'Buzz' if by 5, 'FizzBuzz' if both, else the number itself. One number per line.

examples.explanation: For 1 to 5: multiples of 3 become Fizz, of 5 become Buzz, of both FizzBuzz; others stay as the number.

examples.output:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
examples.explanation: For 1 to 15: multiples of 3 become Fizz, of 5 become Buzz, of both FizzBuzz; others stay as the number.

Fizz
